title: raillardella scaposa
intro: Raillardella scaposa, also known as the alpine fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The alpine fleabane is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
